channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-07-14)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-07-14.

item.title: [HOT] PSP Audioware|PSPaudioware has updated PSP L’otary update to v. 2.2.0. The intro is 70% off.!? NEW
[FREEBIE] Schulz Audio|Schulz Audio is offering Portacrunch 424 plugin for Mac & Win as a free download.!? NEW
[FREEBIE] [HOT] UJAM|UJAM is offering UFX DELAY as a free download for anyone who signs up for their summer sale mailing list.!? NEW
[FREEBIE] HoRNet Plugins|HoRNet Spikes transient processor is free with the code: SPIKESFREE.!? ENDS SOON? NEW

[FREEBIE] Tape DSP|Free Tape DSP Pack ? Machine (tape saturation), Compressor (tape-style glue), and Echo (tape delay). VST3/AU/LV2 for Windows, macOS, and Linux. One installer, no account required.!? NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Tape DSP - Finaliza: None
